cases.description: GET /healthz returns HTTP 200, Content-Type application/json, and body exactly {"status":"ok"} with no extra whitespace
Non-POST methods on /invoke must be rejected; the frozen contract specifies 405 Method Not Allowed

ts.note: TS SDK dispatch() returns 404 for non-POST /invoke instead of 405; tracked for a separate fix PR

cases.description: A handler returning billable_units=0 must be normalised to 1 by the SDK before the response is sent
A handler WorkerError must surface as HTTP 200 with {"error":{"code":"...","message":"...","retryable":...}}; no payload or billable_units in the envelope
POST /invoke with an empty body must return a BAD_REQUEST structured error envelope (empty body is not valid JSON)
